description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a perforated barrel shroud and a prominent vertical magazine. The body is constructed from metal with a matte finish, featuring a pistol grip and a short, cylindrical barrel. The upper receiver has a series of vent holes for cooling, and the magazine is a detachable box type that extends well below the grip. The rifle includes simple iron sights, with the front sight post visible above the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on functionality. The weapon is sized for easy handling and maneuverability in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a perforated barrel shroud, vertical magazine, and pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, perforated shroud, and the vertical magazine directly below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pistol grip, magazine, trigger, and the vented barrel shroud.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the top sight, and the magazine's rear profile.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the magazine, grip, trigger, and the full length of the vented barrel shroud.
